Want $10,000 to throw a party?

We’re looking for independent collectives or anyone who throws raves, parties or sound experiences. You can be anywhere, as long as you’ve got a history of drawing crowds.

We’re not looking for a corporate event. We want to hear your most outrageous ideas. Show us how you use sound to build moments that join people, places and intensity. Head to @community.nothing for more info.

Surprise us.

#memory #childhood #cozy #night #relaxing #traditional #sleep #moment

On a snowy, stormy day, grandma baked traditional tandir bread. She served it with churned butter and “motal” cheese the pure taste of winter.

Qar çovğunlu bir gündə nənə təndir çörəyi bişirdi. Bu isti çörəyi nehrə yağı və motal pendiri ilə təqdim etdi.

#breadbaking #grandma #blizzard #rurallife #winter #tandoori #cooking #cheese #life #cozy

The Grandmother living alone in the remote mountains prepares a meal using the chicken she raised herself. 🥘🐔

Ucqar dağlarda tək yaşayan nənə, öz əlləri ilə böyütdüyü toyuqdan yemək hazırlayır. Ocağın alovu, onun zəhmətini və təbiətlə olan harmoniyasını əks etdirir. Hər ədviyyat keçmişindən bir iz, hər hərəkəti şəfqət doludur. Bu yemək sadəcə qida deyil, nənənin həyatının, sevgisinin və zəhmətinin ləzzətidir.

#cooking #nature #nature #grandma #chickenrecipes #tandoori #viral #rural #delicious #naturephotography #winter #cozy

latestPosts.caption:
Just finished binge-watching our client Cooper Raiff’s new series Hal & Harper — and wow. 

This show is messy, raw, and deeply human: a beautiful, heartbreaking look at grief, family, and how trauma shapes who we become. 

The performances alone (seriously: Lili Reinhart and Cooper Raiff are 🔥) make it a must-watch. 

Final episode just dropped Nov 30 on @MUBI — don’t miss it.

latestPosts.caption:
Meet the Notion Agents iOS app.

A voice note. A photo of a napkin sketch. A question at 11pm. All handled before you're back at your desk.

A team of agents, in your pocket.

Download the iOS app → ntn.so/ios

AI is moving fast. Most companies aren't. 

The loudest stories come from the edges - autonomous agents, massive job losses, whole industries about to flip. Read enough of these stories and it feels like you’re behind and everyone else is way ahead.

This didn’t feel quite right to us. So we surveyed 6,000 professionals across 10 markets to map where AI at work actually is. 

Here’s what we found → ntn.so/2026-research
Scenes from @edgeesmeralda 💭💻
In conversation from our evening with @read.feedme. A snippet from last nights conversation with @emilysundberg + @emmett on the topic of taste, and how it develops 💭

Grab a notebook (or, you know…a Notion page). New Academy path: Notion AI.

Learn to turn docs, meetings, and connected tools into context, so Custom Agents can run workflows end to end.

Finish the path, earn a badge → ntn.so/academy-ai
Today. Join us 9PT/12ET → makewithnotion.com 💾
The way @janineegonzaless captured this feeling better than we ever could. Notion Campus Leader applications close June 14: ntn.so/campus-leaders📓🖤

A look behind the lens. Join us on May 13 to dive into our new developer platform. 

Let’s build, together → makewithnotion.com 💾

Introducing Plan Mode.

Because a prompt without a plan is just a wish.

In plan mode, your agent shows its work in a read-only sandbox before touching anything. 

Just plan → approve → execute.
School is in session! Notion Campus Leader applications are now open — checkout ntn.so/campus-leaders to learn more. See you there! 📝🍎
